claim_boundary: Direct univariate phylo SD profile feasibility plus local n=1 target-split smoke is target-availability and diagnostic evidence only; the smoke retained a clean mu-axis direct SD target and a sigma-axis boundary/profile-budget blocker. It does not promote coverage, derived-correlation intervals, q2, q4/q8, non-Gaussian, REML, AI-REML, inference_ready, supported, bridge support, TSV promotion, or public support.
next_gate: Fisher/Noether/Rose must review the direct SD target split, choose the direct SD interval channel, retained denominator, one-sided miss ledger, and derived-correlation exclusion before any host escalation, coverage grid, TSV promotion, inference_ready, or supported claim.

claim_boundary: Phylo_interaction has q1 pair-level point/extractor evidence only; it is not ordinary q1, not phylo(1 | species), not a q2 or q4 endpoint covariance family, and has no shared phylo or row-specific interval route banked because it pairs two clades and has no single structured group count. It does not promote intervals, coverage, bridge support, non-Gaussian evidence, REML, AI-REML, inference_ready, supported, or public support.
next_gate: Only reopen interval work by writing a Boole/Fisher/Rose-reviewed row-specific Gaussian q1 phylo_interaction interval design that names the target, denominator, one-sided misses, bridge exclusion, and blocked neighbours; until then keep smoke, host escalation, TSV promotion, inference_ready, and supported claims blocked.
